next_action: CEO/operator can review these packet drafts and later issue an explicit scoped decision; until then all blockers remain held.

decision_options.meaning: Approve only the bounded read-only or review scope named in this packet, with no public, account, payment, wallet, or submission side effects.
Keep every blocker in this batch held and require a fresh review later.
Reject or park the batch so lane managers stop waiting on it and continue other local proof work.

packet_drafts.human_prompt: Choose whether to approve only read-only validation/legal review, keep all holds, or reject the marketplace route.

packet_drafts.why_it_matters: This lane has the most complete local product packet and the largest cluster of related gates.

summary: Drafted local CEO decision packets for the three high-leverage blocker batches. The packets present approve/hold/reject options but request or execute nothing.
